meta.name: Aethermourne
meta.description: A world built on the bones of dead gods

regions.name: The Thornwild
regions.terrain: Cycling ecosystem of rapid life and death

landmarks.name: Spine of Order
landmarks.description: Solvaen's vertebral column, a luminous divine bone mountain range

landmarks.name: The Abyssal Trench
landmarks.description: Massive undersea rift, prison of Serith

landmarks.name: The Hollowdeep
landmarks.description: 30-mile crater where Morrhael's skull struck

landmarks.name: The Maelstrom
landmarks.description: Central wound where Vorrhyn was unmade

landmarks.name: The Scarwall
landmarks.description: Living thorn fortification between Dominion and Marches

landmarks.name: Bloom Peaks
landmarks.description: Western mountains with rapid seasonal cycles

landmarks.name: The Caldera Ring
landmarks.description: Chain of five volcanic peaks encircling the Emberveil: Anvil, Bellows, Tongs, Quench, centered on Mount Thalvor

landmarks.name: Mount Thalvor
landmarks.description: Sacred volcanic peak at center of Caldera Ring

landmarks.name: The Marrow Bogs
landmarks.description: Thyrea's marrow seepage zone, south of the Cradle

landmarks.name: Thyrea's Cradle
landmarks.description: Heart of the Verdant Marches, primeval forest

landmarks.name: The Marrow Fields
landmarks.description: Scattered divine bone protrusion sites

landmarks.name: The Ashborn Tundra
landmarks.description: Frozen plains between Pale Wastes Holds

landmarks.name: The Bloom
landmarks.description: Southwestern Thornwild, Thyrea-dominant growth zone

landmarks.name: The Wilt
landmarks.description: Northeastern Thornwild, Morrhael-dominant death zone

landmarks.name: The Bonewood
landmarks.description: Deep interior Thornwild, extreme Cycle collision

landmarks.name: The Threshold
landmarks.description: Central balance band between Bloom and Wilt

landmarks.name: The Shattered Coast
landmarks.description: Fractured western coastline of the Hollowed Reach

landmarks.name: The Weeping Isles
landmarks.description: Sacred archipelago, Belara's remains

landmarks.name: The Ashfields
landmarks.description: Vast grey plains surrounding Spine of Order

landmarks.name: The Calcified Forest
landmarks.description: Eastern petrified woodland

landmarks.name: The Iron Fields
landmarks.description: Interior heartland, dense with Kaevroth fragments

landmarks.name: The Shardfall
landmarks.description: Southeastern fragment impact zone

landmarks.name: The Contested Corridor
landmarks.description: Strategic pass between Ironmarch and Dominion

landmarks.name: The Nethys Pools
landmarks.description: Ley-saturated pool network, center of Greymere

landmarks.name: The Deep Warrens
landmarks.description: Subsurface tunnel network beneath Emberveil

landmarks.name: The Warm Valleys
landmarks.description: Geothermal lowlands between Caldera Ring peaks, radiating from Crucible toward Hearthdeep and Anvilrest

landmarks.name: The Ashfall Slopes
landmarks.description: Outer volcanic flanks facing the Ashen Dominion and Hollowed Reach, Smokewall guards the eastern pass

settlements.name: Ostivaar
settlements.description: Built within Solvaen's ribcage, capital of the Dominion

settlements.name: Roothold
settlements.description: De facto capital in roots of Grandfather titan-tree

settlements.name: Tidewall
settlements.description: Largest port in Aethermourne

settlements.name: Greyhold
settlements.description: De facto center, fortified hold

settlements.name: Crucible
settlements.description: Built in an extinct volcanic caldera

settlements.name: Ironhaven
settlements.description: Seat of the Iron Thane

settlements.name: Riftmarket
settlements.description: Largest settlement, built near the Maelstrom

settlements.name: Fenholm
settlements.description: Built on stilts above luminous marshwater

settlements.name: Cyclethorn
settlements.description: On the Threshold between Bloom and Wilt

settlements.description: Western border fortress facing Scarwall

settlements.description: Northern border fortress watching Pale Wastes

settlements.name: Thornwall
settlements.description: In the Scar, facing Scarwall directly

settlements.description: Island at junction of three Tidal Bridges
